title: Founding AI Engineer
company_focus:
Early-stage AI company building intelligent agent systems
for enterprises
description:
About the job

We’re an early-stage AI company backed by top-tier investors
and world-class angels, including Pear VC. We’re working
with forward-leaning customers who are aggressively adopting
AI at scale, building systems at the frontier of what’s
possible.



Our founding team comes from Google, Facebook, Airbnb, Snap
and Roblox — veteran builders who’ve shipped large-scale,
high-impact products. We’re now assembling a small,
exceptional team to build a category-defining AI company.



If you want to build from zero, move fast, learn faster, and
take true ownership with founding-level equity, this is one
of those once-in-a-decade moments.



What You’ll Do

- Build core systems powering next-generation intelligent
  agent capabilities
- Rapidly prototype, iterate, and ship production features
  used by enterprise customers
- Work directly with founders to shape product, architecture,
  and culture
- Collaborate with customers to deeply understand workflows
  and pain points
- Explore emerging techniques in reasoning, orchestration, and
  multi-agent behavior
- Operate with extreme autonomy — owning projects end-to-end
  from idea → value



Who You Are

- 1–7 years of strong engineering experience
- Fast learner who thrives in ambiguity and loves figuring
  things out
- Obsessed with customers — eager to talk to users and ship
  solutions they rely on
- Hands-on builder comfortable moving from prototype →
  production quickly
- Strong fundamentals across Python, TypeScript, backend
  systems, or infra
- Great team player who enjoys collaborating in a high-
  velocity environment

Why This Role Is Rare

- Backed by elite VCs and top angel operators
- Selected into one of the most competitive accelerator
  cohorts globally
- Founding-level equity and true ownership
- Strong early traction with high-caliber early customers
- Small, elite team — your work will define the company
- Massive whitespace in a rapidly shifting market
- The chance to build foundational AI systems at the frontier
responsibilities: Build core systems powering next-generation intelligent agent capabilities
Rapidly prototype, iterate, and ship production features used by enterprise customers
Work directly with founders to shape product, architecture, and culture
Collaborate with customers to deeply understand workflows and pain points
Explore emerging techniques in reasoning, orchestration, and multi-agent behavior
Own projects end-to-end from idea to delivering customer value
use_cases: Next-generation AI-powered automation for large-scale adoption
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building core systems for intelligent
agent capabilities, exploring reasoning, orchestration, and
multi-agent behavior. The founding engineer will directly
construct AI agent systems from the ground up, making this a
hands-on AI-building role.
